songsAndMeaning.title: Washed
songsAndMeaning.meaning: A celebration of the new life, freedom and identity we have because of Jesus. 'He saved us through the washing of rebirth and renewal by the Holy Spirit.' — Titus 3:5.

songsAndMeaning.title: Another In The Fire
songsAndMeaning.meaning: Inspired by the story of Shadrach, Meshach and Abednego, reminding us that Jesus is with us even in life's fiercest trials. 'Look! I see four men walking around in the fire, unbound and unharmed, and the fourth looks like a son of the gods.' — Daniel 3:25.

songsAndMeaning.title: Christ Is Enough
songsAndMeaning.meaning: A declaration that Christ alone is enough. In a world pulling us in every direction, this song reminds us to have an undivided heart devoted fully to Jesus.

songsAndMeaning.title: Doorkeeper
songsAndMeaning.meaning: A reminder that there is no greater privilege than simply being in God's presence. 'Better is one day in your courts than a thousand elsewhere; I would rather be a doorkeeper in the house of my God than dwell in the tents of the wicked.' — Psalm 84:10.

songsAndMeaning.title: Stand Firm
songsAndMeaning.meaning: An encouragement to remain steadfast in Christ regardless of the pressures around us. It reflects the camp theme by calling us to unwavering faith and an undivided allegiance to Jesus.

songsAndMeaning.title: I Thank God
songsAndMeaning.meaning: A joyful celebration of God's saving grace and the transformation He brings. It's a song of gratitude for the freedom and new life found in Christ.

songsAndMeaning.title: Still
songsAndMeaning.meaning: An invitation to quiet our hearts and trust God's sovereignty, even when life feels overwhelming. 'Be still, and know that I am God.' — Psalm 46:10.
